data.title: Pender Growth Fund (TSXV: PTF) reports financial & operational results for three & six months ending June 30, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Pender Growth Fund Inc. (stock symbol: PTF) disclosed its financial and operational performance for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Judge approves $13M BlockFi settlement after objection dropped, clearing the path for class-action resolution.
data.description: A recent development in the BlockFi case saw a significant move forward as a key investor withdrew an objection originally filed in February. This decision by the investor appears to have paved the way for the progression of a class-action lawsuit settlement. The judge overseeing the case acknowledged this development, indicating a positive step towards resolving the legal dispute. This withdrawal comes after a period of contentious legal wrangling, with the settlement now poised for further advancement. The settlement, which involves a sizable sum in damages, looks to be steadily moving towards a resolution following this latest development.

data.title: Meta stock rebounds with gains after a down week, fueled by Google AI Cloud Deal, amid debate on AI bubble.
data.description: The Meta stock experienced a recovery on Friday, posting gains after a week of declines. The market had been facing uncertainties surrounding the potential AI bubble. The rebound was linked to a recent deal between Meta and Google in the AI cloud sector, along with comments made by the Federal Reserve Chair. These factors contributed to Meta's positive performance, following a challenging period. The details of the agreement and the remarks from the Fed Chair influenced investors' confidence, leading to an upward movement in Meta's stock value amidst market fluctuations.

data.title: Price of LINK expected to reach $30.50 by Sept 2025 as it tests Fibonacci level, with resistance at $27.87. Bullish forecast, $30.50 in 3-4 weeks.
data.description: The latest analysis on LINK price anticipates a positive trend, highlighting a current resistance level at $27.87. The Chainlink forecast indicates a potential rise to $30.50 in the next 3-4 weeks, subject to the maintenance of crucial support levels.

data.title: Prospect Capital (NASDAQ: PSEC) schedules fiscal year earnings release for June 30, 2024, on Aug 26, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Prospect Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: PSEC) revealed its plan to submit its Form 10-K report to the Securities and Exchange Commission showcasing the fiscal year outcomes until June 30, 2024. The company aims to release its earnings report after market closure on Tuesday, August 26, 2025.

data.title: Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. recognized in BINJE’s BEST Health Care 2025 for advancing health equity and sustainable biopharma.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN) of Warren, N.J. was recognized by BINJE's BEST Health Care 2025 for its prominent presence in the health sector. The media outlet showcased the Company's Founder and CEO, Ryan Saadi, MD, MPH, applauding his dedication to health equity and advancements in sustainable biopharmaceuticals. This acknowledgment underscores Tevogen's significance and leadership in the industry.

data.title: Southwest's new seating policy impacts plus-size travelers; those encroaching on a seat must buy extra ticket, no refunds.
data.description: The airline is implementing new rules which will oblige passengers who take up space in the neighboring seat to buy an extra ticket. This policy will not offer refunds.

data.title: Trump announced potential 10% stake in Intel; stock rose by 6%. Deal not finalized yet. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Intel Corp.'s stock (INTC) surged over 6% on Friday following President Trump's statement that the government should obtain a 10% stake in the troubled chipmaker. Trump mentioned that Intel had agreed to the deal, deeming it beneficial for the company. However, a White House official mentioned that discussions with Intel are still in progress, and no definitive decision has been reached yet. President Trump's net worth exceeded $5.5 billion after a recent $100 million increase. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Eagles legend Brandon Graham partners with Firstrust Bank for new "Edge" campaign in Philadelphia.Characters: 103
data.description: Brandon Graham, renowned as one of the NFL's top edge rushers, will be highlighted in Firstrust's upcoming "Edge" campaign in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania. Despite retiring from football, Graham continues to make an impact for Philadelphia. The campaign is set to emphasize his legacy and skills to leverage his popularity, with the launch scheduled for August 22, 2025. This marketing strategy aims to capitalize on Graham's reputation, reaching a broad audience and potentially garnering significant attention and engagement.

data.title: Price of MATIC forecasted to reach $0.45-$0.50 by September 2025 despite short-term challenges; immediate support at $0.35 crucial for bullish trend.
data.description: Experts are forecasting a potential rebound for MATIC with a projected price range of $0.45 to $0.50 over the next 4 to 6 weeks. However, a period of immediate weakness is anticipated, with the $0.35 mark crucial for bullish tendencies to sustain.

data.title: Fed indicates inflation risks due to trade tariffs, keeping funds rate at 4.25%-4.50%. Two members dissent in favor of rate cut.
data.description: The Federal Open Market Committee minutes from July revealed that inflation risks are still significant due to new trade tariffs, causing doubts about potential interest rate cuts. Despite concerns about a slowdown in the labor market, Fed officials decided to keep the federal funds rate at 4.25%-4.50%. However, two governors, Michelle Bowman and Christopher Waller, dissented for a rate cut of 25 basis points, noting that excluding tariff effects, inflation was close to the committee's 2 percent target. They believed higher tariffs would not have lasting effects on inflation and expressed worry about weakening labor market conditions. The majority of the room remained favorable towards maintaining rates. Governor Christopher Waller and Michelle Bowman believed higher tariffs wouldn't have lasting impacts on inflation. Their concerns included a slowing private payroll gains, and limited sector hiring.

data.title: Nasdaq jumps 2%, Dow up 1.91% to 45,642.89, Workday shares fall 3% after Q2 results, gaining 1.96%, S&P 500 rises 1.55%.
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. closed the week on a positive note, with the Nasdaq Composite soaring around 2% on Friday. The Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed 1.91% to 45,642.89, while the NASDAQ surged 1.96% to 21,513.52. The S&P 500 also saw gains, rising 1.55% to 6,468.68. Consumer discretionary sector shares saw a significant increase of 3.3% on Friday, while consumer staples stocks experienced a slight decline of 0.3%. Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) encountered a more than 3% drop following lower-than-expected second-quarter results and third-quarter sales outlook. The company also revealed plans to acquire Paradox. EpicQuest Education Group International Ltd (NASDAQ: - mentioned in the full story on Benzinga.com -) saw notable upwards movement in equities trading.
